Description: Landscape Architect — site plan design development and IFC drawing production (L-001 through L-004)
Notes: Primary design effort: site layout; grading framework; hardscape; pad layout; site details; planting zone framework; IFC preparation. LOE from Level_of_Effort.csv R-19.

Description: Project Manager — coordination and oversight for landscape site plans
Notes: PM oversight: scope boundary coordination with civil; review cycles; County approval gate management; IFC issue coordination. LOE from Level_of_Effort.csv R-01.

Description: Cost Estimator — quantity takeoff and benchmarking support for landscape site plans
Notes: Estimating support: quantity takeoff for landscape elements; cost benchmarking. LOE from Level_of_Effort.csv R-08.

Description: Cross-discipline coordination — Landscape/Civil overlay review and conflict resolution
SourceSection: Step 4 — Coordinate with Civil Grading and Other Disciplines
Notes: Coordination with Civil Engineer (DEL-005-02 and DEL-005-03); overlay review; conflict resolution documentation. Included in Landscape Architect LOE above; priced as embedded activity.

Description: Geotechnical findings review and drawing revision (if required)
Notes: Review of DEL-008-01 geotech report and potential drawing revisions. Included in Landscape Architect LOE above; priced as embedded activity.

Description: Internal quality review — drawing content and coordination check
Notes: QA review against Specification REQ-007-02-01 through REQ-007-02-10; drawing quality acceptance criteria. Included in Landscape Architect LOE above; priced as embedded activity.

Description: P.Eng. review and IFC stamp — professional engineer seal on all IFC sheets
SourceSection: REQ-007-02-06 — IFC Drawing Standard P.Eng. Stamp
Notes: P.Eng. stamp required on all IFC landscape drawings per RFP s3.3.2. Stamp coordination effort included in PM LOE; stamp fee itself not separately priced in available sources — covered under project-wide professional services.

Description: IFC drawing set production — final sheet preparation and issue (4 sheets anticipated: L-001 through L-004)
Notes: Final IFC sheet preparation; revision tracking; transmittal records. Production effort included in Landscape Architect LOE (ITEM-007-02-01).
